data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Credit-limit checks', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or testing of credit-limit checks within the booking process. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of credit-limit checks being implemented or validated in the booking process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
